paper_focus.title: Low-density Fe40Mn19Ni15Al15Si10C1 high entropy steel processed by mechanical alloying and spark plasma sintering: Phase evolution, microstructure and mechanical properties
paper_focus.research_objective: To design a low-density, dual-phase (BCC + B2) high entropy steel with superior strength-ductility synergy and thermal stability via mechanical alloying and spark plasma sintering, and to correlate phase evolution, microstructure, and strengthening mechanisms.
material_systems: Fe5Si3-type silicide (hP16, a=b=0.667 nm, c=0.468 nm)
expected_information_axis: mechanical properties (hardness, compressive strength, ductility, elastic modulus)
strengthening mechanisms (grain boundary, dislocation, precipitation, solid solution)
